globalRule.description: Flags records where the Production_ID is duplicated, indicating a breach of uniqueness for production records across VINs and plant identifiers.
globalRule.expression: SELECT t1.* FROM INTERNALQUERY t1 JOIN (SELECT @Production_ID@ AS prod_id_col, COUNT(*) AS prod_id_count FROM INTERNALQUERY GROUP BY @Production_ID@ HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) t2 ON t1.@Production_ID@ = t2.prod_id_col WHERE t1.@VIN@ IS NOT NULL AND t1.@Plant_ID@ IS NOT NULL;

globalRule.description: Detects vehicles with a Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) that does not have the standard length of 17 characters, affecting model name and year data integrity.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE LENGTH(@VIN@) != 17 AND @Model_Name@ IS NOT NULL AND @Model_Year@ IS NOT NULL;

globalRule.description: Identifies records where the Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) is not unique across production records, indicating a critical data integrity issue for production ID and date.
globalRule.expression: SELECT t1.* FROM INTERNALQUERY t1 JOIN (SELECT @VIN@ AS vin_col, COUNT(*) AS vin_count FROM INTERNALQUERY GROUP BY @VIN@ HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) t2 ON t1.@VIN@ = t2.vin_col WHERE t1.@Production_ID@ IS NOT NULL AND t1.@Production_Date@ IS NOT NULL;

globalRule.description: Flags vehicle production records where essential identifiers like Production_ID, VIN, or Model_Name are missing, violating data completeness requirements.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE @Production_ID@ IS NULL OR @VIN@ IS NULL OR @Model_Name@ IS NULL;

globalRule.description: Identifies records where the production date is set after the end of its associated model year, which is an invalid temporal sequence for the vehicle's lifecycle and status.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE @Production_Date@ > DATE_ADD(MAKE_DATE(@Model_Year@, 12, 31), 1) AND @Production_ID@ IS NOT NULL AND @Vehicle_Status@ IS NOT NULL;

globalRule.description: Detects vehicles where the production date's year does not match the declared model year, indicating a data entry inconsistency for the VIN.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE YEAR(@Production_Date@) != @Model_Year@ AND @VIN@ IS NOT NULL;

globalRule.description: Flags records where the Engine_Type is not valid for the Model_Name and Model_Year, such as an EV model without an Electric engine or an Electric engine in an older non-EV model.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records` WHERE (Model_Name LIKE 'EV%' AND Engine_Type != 'Electric') OR (Model_Name NOT LIKE 'EV%' AND Engine_Type = 'Electric' AND Model_Year < 2020)

globalRule.description: Flags records where the Production_ID is duplicated within the same Plant_ID, suggesting a non-unique production identifier for a specific plant.
globalRule.expression: SELECT t1.* FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records` t1 JOIN (SELECT Production_ID, Plant_ID FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records` GROUP BY Production_ID, Plant_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) t2 ON t1.Production_ID = t2.Production_ID AND t1.Plant_ID = t2.Plant_ID

globalRule.description: Flags vehicles with a future Production_Date where its year is also beyond the Model_Year, suggesting an impossible future production timeline for the vehicle status.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records` WHERE Production_Date > CURRENT_DATE() AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Production_Date) > Model_Year

globalRule.description: Identifies records where the year extracted from Production_Date does not match the Model_Year, indicating a temporal discrepancy for the production record.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records` WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Production_Date) != Model_Year
